name: Bao Hackmon

signature_move.name: Fif Cross
signature_move.description: Slashes with the sharp nails on both hands.

description: Hackmon underwent bouts of harsh training, honing its unparalleled battle instincts, and attained this form as it grew together with its spirit, technique, and physical strength. It continues its training as it aims for greater heights, amassing combat experience by battling strong foes and evolving into a skilled warrior the more it battles. As it matures, its aspiration of becoming a Royal Knight grows ever stronger, and it believes that what it is destined to achieve is determined not by what others tell it, but by deciding based on its own observations and inferences. Its Special Moves have all been powered up, and consist of slashing with its claws ( Fif Cross ), as well as rotating the blade on its tail about its axis and stabbing with it ( Teen Blade ); the move Burn Flame that it is capable of using for counterattacking has also risen in power remarkably. Furthermore, it is also able to bisect the enemy using the razor-sharp blades that protrude from its hind limbs ( Dragless-spiker ).
